---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Contact — Davide Rolfi"
---

# Get in touch

<p class="page-intro">
I welcome enquiries about research, seminars, teaching, academic service, or related academic opportunities.
</p>

<div class="contact-panel">

<div class="contact-block">

<h3>Davide Rolfi</h3>

<p>
PhD Candidate in Actuarial Science<br>
Bayes Business School<br>
City St George's, University of London
</p>

<p>
<strong>Email</strong> · <a href="mailto:davide.rolfi@bayes.city.ac.uk">davide.rolfi@bayes.city.ac.uk</a>
</p>

</div>

<div class="contact-links">

<h3>Profiles</h3>

<ul>
<li><a href="files/CV_Davide.pdf">Academic CV (PDF)</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/davide-rolfi-3b9128211/">LinkedIn</a></li>
<li><a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0000-3919-2546">ORCID</a></li>
</ul>

</div>

</div>
